properties.name: camunda.connector.agenticai.a2a.client.outbound.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable/register the A2A Client connector.

properties.name: camunda.connector.agenticai.a2a.client.polling.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable/register the A2A polling inbound connector.

properties.name: camunda.connector.agenticai.a2a.client.agentic.tool.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the A2A Client connector to be used as an AI Agent tool.
